title: The Expedition against the Banu al-Mulawwiki
description: In $afar of this year the Messenger of God sent Ghalib b. `Abdallah al-Laythi on a raid to al-Kadid against the Banu al -Mulawwih.592 [iS98J According to Abu Ja' far [al-Tabarij: The report of this raiding

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
